channel.title: Posts on awbuana
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on awbuana

item.title: CPU Limits vs Memory Limits: When 'Survival' Means Different Things
item.description: I said memory limits are about survival. But what does 'survival' actually mean for stateless vs stateful workloads? The answer surprised me.

item.title: The Resource Request You Think Is Saving Money Is Actually Breaking Your App
item.description: Most developers set Kubernetes resource requests wrong. Here's what I learned about CPU throttling, bin packing, and why your optimized GKE cluster might be the problem.

item.title: Why Your Pod Died: The Brutal Difference Between CPU and Memory Limits
item.description: CPU throttles. Memory kills. Understanding this fundamental difference will save you from 3 AM pages.
